_doc: Per-preset diffRatio ceilings for the MapLibre parity gate. The spec asserts measured diffRatio ≤ baseline × HEADROOM. Values captured 2026-05-13 after (a) line AA spec realignment (aa_width_px = 1/dpr + blur) and (b) translucent composite premultiply fix (c.rgb * c.a * opacity instead of c.rgb * opacity, so AA edge pixels no longer doubled in brightness vs MapLibre below the opacity=1.0 threshold). Tokyo / Manhattan diffs reflect sharper-than-ML road edges; demotiles_world moved slightly because the previous brightness bug was masking a small line-width mismatch. Rebake on every PR that explicitly notes a regression or improvement; do not silently relax.
